title: File Loading & Project Data
summary: Load the “Representation” product catalog, validate it with reps, load project/historical files, and confirm processing finishes.
overview:
Files need orgs (for placement) and benefit from users (for ownership/visibility). Load the product catalog — labeled **“Representation”** — validate it against the client's current line card with the reps, then load project and (if in scope) historical files.

Processing/indexing can take time depending on file size; BuildVision notifies when extraction completes. Confirm nothing is stuck before handoff.
prerequisites: Phase 1 (Organizations) complete — files need an org to attach to
Line-card data source confirmed from intake
tips: The catalog is labeled **“Representation”** inside the platform.
Catalog corrections (add/remove/fix) are handled by the CX Lead **the same day** they're flagged — build that turnaround into the plan.
Large files take longer to process; extraction runs in the background and notifies on completion.
warnings: Historical-file handling and current-project-file loading are not defined in the source — confirm scope and procedure with CS first (Process Gaps B-1, B-2).
There is no documented expected processing time — B-3. Don't assume 'stuck'; verify status.
commonMistakes: Loading the catalog but never walking it with reps to catch missing/incorrect items.
Uploading historical files without confirming scope with CS.
Declaring done while files are still processing / not yet searchable.

steps.title: Load the product catalog (“Representation”)
steps.description: Load the “Representation” product catalog for the organization.
steps.verify: Catalog appears under the correct organization.

steps.title: Review & validate the catalog with reps
steps.description: Walk the catalog with reps against the client's current line card; log any add/remove/correct items and route to the CX Lead for a same-day update.
steps.verify: Reps confirm the catalog matches the current line card.

callouts.text: CX Lead turns catalog corrections around the same day they're flagged — schedule the walkthrough so fixes can land quickly.

steps.title: Upload historical files (if in scope)
steps.description: If historical files are in scope, upload them — confirming procedure and scope with CS first, since it is undocumented.
steps.verify: Files land in the intended location.

callouts.text: Historical-file handling is not defined in the source (Process Gaps B-1). Confirm scope with CS before doing this.

steps.title: Load current project files
steps.description: Load current project files (e.g. drag a PDF — plans, specs, schedules, addenda — onto the upload zone to start extraction).
steps.verify: Files attach to the correct org/project.

callouts.text: The internal project-file loading procedure is not defined in the source (Process Gaps B-2).

steps.title: Verify files appear correctly (gate)
steps.description: Confirm files show up in the right org/project.
steps.verify: Files visible in the correct org/project.

steps.title: Confirm indexing / processing is complete
steps.description: Confirm no files are stuck processing and content is searchable/usable.
steps.verify: No files stuck in a processing state; content is searchable/usable.

screenshots.caption: Files tab — schedule tags jump straight to the right page in the plans.
Upload zone — drag plans, specs, or schedules (PDF) to start extraction.
